title: Require Agent Plugin Command Channel Topology
forbids: lifecycle host composition or curated commands outside their one closed root, or nested curated command aliases
why: The CLI has one lifecycle service host, one native-provider binding root, and one curated command root under rawr agent plugins; native Oclif extension commands are composed from @oclif/plugin-plugins rather than authored in this source tree.
remediate: Keep lifecycle service composition in service-runtime/client.ts, native provider adaptation under bindings/providers, curated commands under agent/plugins, and vendor commands at agent/plugins/status/vendors.ts and agent/plugins/update/vendors.ts.
message: Agent-plugin lifecycle bindings and curated commands must remain in their closed topology.
